title: Gunman II
original_title: มือปืน 2 สาละวิน
overview: The border of Burma and Thailand is lawless place, where people live and die by the law of the gun. Into this situation comes a young police lieutenant, intent on reforming the rough and rowdy local police force along the Salween River.

trailers.title: มือปืน 2 สาละวิน - Salween
